d:
Pandora's box holds both calamity and hope. 
Passive. Pandora herself is protected by hope and is not affected by this skill.
Active. Pandora opens the box to unleash calamity, causing all units on the battlefield to flee in [[fright|fear]] toward their own side for [[5]]s and lose [[50%]]<ATK> HP per [[0.5]]s in the process. When the [[fright|fear]] effect wears off, their ATK is reduced by [[10%]] for [[8]]s. This ATK reduction effect can stack up to [[3]] times.
Increases enemy's HP loss to [[55%]]<ATK> every [[0.5]]s.
Increases enemy's HP loss to [[60%]]<ATK> every [[0.5]]s.
Increases enemy's HP loss to [[65%]]<ATK> every [[0.5]]s.
Increases enemy's HP loss to [[70%]]<ATK> every [[0.5]]s.

When a battle starts, Pandora pulls the [[rearmost ally|backest]] into her box, making them [[invincible|invincible]] but unable to cast skills. After [[4]]s, the ally is released from the box. If Pandora is still alive when that happens, the ally gains [[1000]] Energy, as well as [[35%]] ATK for the next [[10]]s.
When released from the box, the ally gains [[40%]] ATK.
When released from the box, the ally gains [[45%]] ATK.
When released from the box, the ally gains [[50%]] ATK.

Passive. Each time Pandora casts her skills, she restores [[290%]]<ATK> HP and [[90]] Energy to the ally she released from her box. At the same time, the box applies Corruption, a permanent debuff that increases damage taken by [[10%]], to both Pandora and one random enemy not yet affected by Corruption. Pandora's Corruption can stack up to [[4]] times, while the enemy's Corruption does not stack.
Active. Pandora inflicts a random number of unique debuffs on an enemy over the next [[10]]s, prioritizing enemies not already affected by this skill. The number of unique debuffs is equal to Pandora's current Corruption stacks. These debuffs may include: reducing Haste by [[45]], reducing Energy recovery by [[45%]], reducing Vitality by [[45]], or causing the affected unit's normal attacks to have a [[45%]] chance to miss. These effects do not stack.
Increases HP and Energy restored to the ally to [[300%]]<ATK> and [[100]], respectively.
Increases HP and Energy restored to the ally to [[310%]]<ATK> and [[110]], respectively.
Increases HP and Energy restored to the ally to [[320%]]<ATK> and [[120]], respectively.
During battle, Pandora's max HP increases by [[12%]], and by an additional [[6%]] after being corrupted by her box.
During battle, Pandora's max HP increases by [[18%]], and by an additional [[9%]] after being corrupted by her box.
During battle, Pandora's max HP increases by [[24%]], and by an additional [[12%]] after being corrupted by her box.

After Pandora is defeated, the box stays on the battlefield. It's indestructible, unaffected, and won't be prioritized as a target. It has an Energy cap of 1,000 and recovers [[45]] Energy per second. At full Energy, the box unleashes Panic Projection again, but without the HP loss effect. Every [[5]]s, it also casts Tainted Tribute on a random enemy but inflicts only one random debuff.
Increases the box's Energy recovery to [[55]] per second.
Panic Projection's ATK reduction effect on enemies becomes permanent.
Increases the box's Energy recovery to [[65]] per second.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: The ally pulled into Pandora's box is permanently protected by hope, making them immune to Panic Projection. This effect remains even after Pandora is defeated.
